sourcesContent:
Template Gallery

Choose a template built for clarity, speed, and ATS readability.

Pick a layout, fill your content section by section, preview the result, and download when the structure is ready.

Back to dashboard Upload instead
No templates are available in this filter yet. Upload more templates as admin or switch categories.

{{ template.category }}

{{ template.name }}

{{ template.premium ? 'Premium' : 'Free' }} Uploaded

Structured template intended for recruiter scanning, ATS parsing, and clean on-screen editing inside the builder.

Use template Preview
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { ResumeTemplate } from '../../../core/models/resume.model'; import { ResumeService } from '../../../core/services/resume.service'; import { TemplateFilterState } from '../template-filter-sidebar/template-filter-sidebar.component'; @Component({ selector: 'app-template-list', templateUrl: './template-list.component.html' }) export class TemplateListComponent implements OnInit { templates: ResumeTemplate[] = []; loading = true; search = ''; previewTemplate: ResumeTemplate | null = null; filters: TemplateFilterState = { role: 'developer', experience: 'mid', layout: '', style: '', category: '', isAts: true, premiumOnly: false }; constructor(private readonly resumeService: ResumeService) { } ngOnInit(): void { this.loadTemplates(); } get recommendedTemplates(): ResumeTemplate[] { return this.templates.filter((template) => template.roleType === 'developer' && (template.experienceLevel === 'mid' || template.experienceLevel === 'senior') ).slice(0, 3); } onFiltersChange(filters: TemplateFilterState): void { this.filters = filters; this.loadTemplates(); } onSearchChange(): void { this.loadTemplates(); } openPreview(template: ResumeTemplate): void { this.previewTemplate = template; } private loadTemplates(): void { this.loading = true; this.resumeService.getTemplatesFiltered({ search: this.search || undefined, role: this.filters.role || undefined, experience: this.filters.experience || undefined, layout: this.filters.layout || undefined, style: this.filters.style || undefined, category: this.filters.category || undefined, isAts: this.filters.isAts, premium: this.filters.premiumOnly ? true : undefined }).subscribe({ next: (templates) => { this.templates = templates; this.loading = false; }, error: () => { this.loading = false; } }); } }
